Dems\xe2\x80\x99 Big Chill, Murdoch\xe2\x80\x99s Succession Shocker, Netflix Trial Agita

Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your pocket guide to Puck\xe2\x80\x99s best new reporting.

First up today, Eriq Gardner sifts through three legal disputes captivating media insiders from Hollywood to Washington\xe2\x80\x94 Zachary Young \xe2\x80\x99s libel suit against CNN, Netflix\xe2\x80\x99s first-ever jury trial, and the appellate ruling upholding the TikTok ban\xe2\x80\x94and what they portend about First Amendment litigation under Trump 2.0.

Plus, below the fold: Marion Maneker investigates the latest round of layoffs at Sotheby\xe2\x80\x99s and the dizzying ramifications for the 280-year-old auction house. Abby Livingston probes the Dems\xe2\x80\x99 tactical silence toward Trump\xe2\x80\x99s cabinet nominees and a fresh round of House G.O.P. infighting. On Somebody\xe2\x80\x99s Gotta Win , Tara Palmeri connects with Dylan Byers to examine the pitiable state of cable news and how the media might address Trump\xe2\x80\x99s second presidency. On The Varsity , John Ourand and WaPo \xe2\x80\x99s Ben Strauss dig into Stephen A. \xe2\x80\x99s soon-to-be historic contract, Big Ten\xe2\x80\x99s football switcheroo, and the shocking non-bidders for the FIFA Women\xe2\x80\x99s World Cup. And on The Powers That Be , Eriq sits down with Peter Hamby to unravel the latest twist in Rupert Murdoch \xe2\x80\x99s high-stakes succession battle against his children.

Netflix\xe2\x80\x99s First Jury Trial & CNN\xe2\x80\x99s Defamation Danger

ERIQ GARDNER

A suite of cases involving Netflix, TikTok, and CNN hint at the future of First Amendment litigation under Trump 2.0.

A MESSAGE FROM META

Open source AI helps more people build amazing things.

Meta\xe2\x80\x99s open source AI is available to all, not just the few. Which means more people can build amazing things.

It enables small businesses, start-ups, students, researchers and more to download and build with our models at no cost.

Learn more about open source AI.

Sotheby\xe2\x80\x99s Black Tuesday

MARION MANEKER

Shortly after closing on a $1 billion financing, the 280-year-old auction house is drastically cutting back staff in offices around the world. With new real estate that emphasizes luxury retail and plans to exploit the power of its brand, what does the future look like for a leaner, meaner Sotheby\xe2\x80\x99s?

Democrats\xe2\x80\x99 Big Chill

ABBY LIVINGSTON

Trump\xe2\x80\x99s unusually early cabinet appointment timeline has given his nominees time to wear down reluctant G.O.P. senators. It\xe2\x80\x99s also given Democrats a chance to shut up, sit back, and watch the Republican infighting. But sitting quietly has never been one of their strengths.

Dylan Byers on How to Cover Trump 2.0

TARA PALMERI

Tara is joined by Puck\xe2\x80\x99s own Dylan Byers to talk about Donald Trump\xe2\x80\x99s relationship with the media and investigative journalism. They discuss how Trump\xe2\x80\x99s previous administration altered modern political discourse, speculate on the future of big cable news after the last election cycle, and shine a light on how the media has to change the way it covers his upcoming presidency.

Stephen A. Breaks the Bank & World Cup Media Limbo

JOHN OURAND

Ben Strauss reunites with John to delve into a litany of hot topics stimulating the world of sports media: Stephen A. Smith\xe2\x80\x99s soon-to-be historic contract, Big Ten football\xe2\x80\x99s noon kickoffs, ESPN\xe2\x80\x99s MNF Simpsons alt-cast, the surprising non-bidders for the FIFA Women\xe2\x80\x99s World Cup, and more.

The Murdoch Succession Shocker & TikTok\xe2\x80\x99s Trump Card

PETER HAMBY & ERIQ GARDNER

Legal expert Eriq Gardner joins Peter to explain the latest twist in Rupert Murdoch\xe2\x80\x99s high-stakes succession battle against his children. Then they debate the chances that Trump saves TikTok now that a federal court has upheld the app\xe2\x80\x99s ban, slated for January.
